CVE-2012-1177.title: libgdata before 0.10.2 and 0.11.x before 0.11.1 does not validate ...
CVE-2012-1177.description: libgdata before 0.10.2 and 0.11.x before 0.11.1 does not validate SSL certificates, which allows remote attackers to obtain user names and passwords via a man-in-the-middle (MITM) attack with a spoofed certificate.
